openingQuery: Linen pieces that soften over seasons

chat.content: Linen pieces that soften over seasons

For linen that gets better with time, start with the Washed Linen Throw ($138): already soft, but better after a season on the sofa. The Linen Napkin Set ($58) has the same lived-in logic at a smaller scale, especially if the gift is meant for a table rather than a closet.

toolCalls.description: Semantic search for linen home pieces that soften with use
toolCalls.sql:
SELECT name, brand, price, 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM product_catalog
WHERE (category ILIKE '%linen%' OR description ILIKE '%linen%')
  AND quantity > 0
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 10;
toolCalls.resultSummary: Washed Linen Throw and Linen Napkin Set returned as home-leaning linen pieces

sections.title: The material lens
paragraphs: Theo's linen ask is not travel wardrobe. The skill steers the search toward home goods and language about softening, washing, and patina.
